title: Yijing Hexagram 41: Sun (Decrease)
description: Hexagram 41 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 41 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Decrease combined with sincerity brings about supreme good fortune without blame.
